author: y4rr
content: Implement Sprint C.3: bf16 x f32-accumulator mixed-precision kernels (#518 partial). Three kernels: (1) matmul_bf16_f32 via cublasGemmEx CUDA_R_16BF/CUBLAS_COMPUTE_32F — blas.rs already has gpu_matmul_bf16, just needs trait wiring; (2) bmm_bf16_f32 via new gpu_bmm_bf16 in blas.rs using cublasGemmStridedBatchedEx with same dtypes; (3) softmax_bf16_f32 via new PTX kernel SOFTMAX_BF16_F32_PTX in kernels.rs — bf16 input (u16 bit patterns) loaded via ld.global.u16 + cvt.f32.bf16, all accumulation in f32, f32 output. Trait methods added to gpu_dispatch.rs, wired in backend_impl.rs. Probe: _probe_c3_bf16_mixed_prec.rs. Fix needed: cpu_to_gpu needs elem_size=2 arm for CudaSlice<u16> upload (bf16 softmax probe path), and matmul tolerance needs widening to 5e-3 for bf16 precision.
